ValidationRule.description: Cannot change Account once Products are set.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( HasOpportunityLineItem, OR( ISCHANGED( AccountId ), ISCHANGED( Contracting_Account__c ), ISCHANGED( Billing_Account__c ) ), NOT( $Permission.Change_Account_on_Opportunity_Once_Products_Are_Set ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot change Account once Products are added, contact your System Admin for help.
